name: Snails Cauderan/ Escargots a La Cauderan
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the lard in a sauté pan and brown the ham and chopped shallots. Add a small amount of breadcrumbs soaked in the wine.
2. Moisten with chicken stock and season with salt and pepper. Add the bouquet garni.
3. Cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the starved and well-washed snails. Cook over low heat for 40 minutes, turning often.
Preparation Time: 1 hour
Cooking Time: 1 hour
